title: Stuffed Unicorn Animal Plush Toys Soft Cuddle Pillow Doll Cartoon Unicorn Plush Gifts for Boys Girls (White, 25cm/9.84inch)
features: 【Unicorn Plushie with Rainbow Wings】This plush rainbow unicorn has colorful horns and wings. Its eyes are closed, and you will get happiness and peace from the smile on its lips.

【Super Soft Stuffed Unicorn Plush Pillow 】This Unicorn plush has high-quality PP polyester filling and skin-friendly fabrics give you better skin touch feeling. Soft and it feels like you are hugging a cotton candy.

【Huggable Unicorn Stuffed Animal】little kids can snuggle with the stuffed unicorn pillow while playing and sleeping, and office members also can have comfortable relaxing time with the soft office animal pillow.
【Perfect Gift】The cute and adorable unicorn stuffed animal gives you colorful dreams. Children can't help but come and play with the unicorn when they see it. Great gift for kids, family and friends
【Safe to Kids】Embroidered eye and nose details ensure safe and durable use;extra-cuddly and huggable, safe for kids to play with.
description: Product Description Vacuum Packaging Quick recovery Take out the from the compressed package, shake and stretch it. Use your hand smooth its plush and adjust the fillers position Exposure it in the sun or the floor a few days Put the in the dryer, it will recover better.
